title: Build a Basic Product website using JSON

content.problemStatement:
In this problem you are building APIs to show all the products and products based on their id.

### Task:

1. The first api - `/api/products` should display all the products in json format.


2. The second api - `/api/products/1` should display the product with id 1 and so on.


3. And if the product with the particular id doesn't exist like this `/api/products/100` then it should show error :
